summary: Cap change-event-system audit log at 10k events with 7-day TTL to prevent unbounded memory growth and write latency spikes
details: Added MAX_AUDIT_EVENTS (10000) and MAX_AUDIT_AGE_MS (7 days) constants. New _maybeRotateAuditLog() method slices to newest 10k events and filters events older than 7 days. Called at start of _persistAuditLog() before serialization. Updated existing test timestamps from hardcoded 2024 values to recent Date.now()-based offsets for TTL compatibility.
impact: Medium - prevents OOM and write latency spikes from unbounded audit log growth
